zh.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus是Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton和Juetta de Arches的女兒，出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素。她於1182年與Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1196年9月29日在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克，埋葬在英國越可爾惠特比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus是Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton和Juetta de Arches的女儿，出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素。她于1182年与Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1196年9月29日在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克，埋葬在英国越可爾惠特比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus was born in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton and Juetta de Arches. She married Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth in 1182, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 29 September 1196, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, and was buried in Whitby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus est née à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton et Juetta de Arches. Elle a épousé Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth en 1182, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1196, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus wurde in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton und Juetta de Arches geboren. Sie hat 1182 in Yorkshire, England Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. September 1196 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England und wurde in Whitby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus è nata il nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England come figlia di Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton e Juetta de Arches. Lei sposato Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth nel 1182, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 settembre 1196, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, e fu sepolta a Whitby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストル
ja.Skelton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン
ja.Whitby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビー
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brusはイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルでAdam de Brus Lord of SkeltonとJuetta de Archesの娘として生まれた。1182年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでHenry de Percy I, Lord of Petworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1196年9月29日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus(은)는 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton(와)과 Juetta de Arches의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 요르크실르에서 Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1196년 9월 29일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 휘트비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus nasceu em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton e Juetta de Arches. Ela casou-se com Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth em 1182, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1196, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus родилась в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton и Juetta de Arches. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth в 1182 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 29 сентября 1196 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия и была похоронена в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel de Brus nació en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton y Juetta de Arches. Se casó con Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth en 1182, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1196, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
